body: Locate TUNGSTEN 9.37 on this machine (search MQL4/Experts and all known TUNGSTEN directories). Once found, copy the .mq4 file into files/from-agent/ with a manifest JSON alongside it (fields: id, timestamp, direction, filename, description, requires_consent:false). Commit and push so chat side can pull and read it. Do not modify the file -- send it exactly as-is.
